## 📰 Hacker News Highlights / 黑客新闻精选

### The Virtual OS Museum: A Comprehensive Emulation Platform for Historical Operating Systems

* **What it is**: A Linux VM (compatible with QEMU, VirtualBox, UTM) that functions as a virtual museum of operating systems, featuring pre-installed and pre-configured emulators with a custom launcher and snapshot functionality
* **Scope**: Covers the entire history of computing from 1948's Manchester Baby to present day, including mainframes (CTSS, MVS, Multics), Unix variants (SunOS, IRIX, NeXTSTEP), home computers (Apple II, Commodore, ZX Spectrum), personal computer OSes (DOS, OS/2, Windows 1.0-Longhorn, classic Mac OS), and mobile/embedded systems (PalmOS, Symbian, early Android/iOS)
* **Versions available**: Full version (offline-ready with all images pre-downloaded) and lite version (downloads images on first run); both support automatic and manual updates
* **Purpose**: Makes historical software preservation accessible by eliminating the complexity of configuring emulators and installing vintage OSes, allowing users to explore computing history with one click
* **Development**: 20+ years of collecting work by a single curator, with many installations including period-appropriate software, applications, and tools; some emulators required patches to run on modern systems or fix regressions
* **Support options**: Patreon for ongoing support, Ko-fi for one-time contributions, Discord/Fluxer community for discussions, and GitLab for bug reports and patches

### 虚拟操作系统博物馆：历史操作系统的综合模拟平台

* **项目介绍**：一个 Linux 虚拟机（兼容 QEMU、VirtualBox、UTM），作为操作系统的虚拟博物馆，配备预安装和预配置的模拟器，提供自定义启动器和快照功能
* **覆盖范围**：涵盖从 1948 年曼彻斯特 Baby 到现代的完整计算历史，包括大型机（CTSS、MVS、Multics）、Unix 变体（SunOS、IRIX、NeXTSTEP）、家用电脑（Apple II、Commodore、ZX Spectrum）、个人电脑操作系统（DOS、OS/2、Windows 1.0 至 Longhorn、经典 Mac OS）以及移动/嵌入式系统（PalmOS、Symbian、早期 Android/iOS）
* **可用版本**：完整版（离线可用，预下载所有镜像）和精简版（首次运行时下载镜像）；两个版本均支持自动和手动更新
* **项目目标**：通过消除配置模拟器和安装老式操作系统的复杂性，使历史软件保存变得易于访问，让用户只需点击即可探索计算历史
* **开发历程**：由单人策展人历时 20 多年收集整理，许多安装包含符合时代特征的软件、应用程序和工具；部分模拟器需要打补丁才能在现代系统上运行或修复回归问题
* **支持方式**：Patreon 提供持续支持，Ko-fi 接受一次性捐赠，Discord/Fluxer 社区用于讨论交流，GitLab 用于提交错误报告和补丁

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://virtualosmuseum.org/)**

### Apple Unveils New Accessibility Features Powered by Apple Intelligence

* **Apple Intelligence enhances core accessibility tools**: VoiceOver, Magnifier, Voice Control, and Accessibility Reader gain AI-powered capabilities including detailed image descriptions and natural language navigation
* **VoiceOver and Magnifier improvements**: Image Explorer provides detailed descriptions of photos, documents, and visual content; users can ask questions about camera viewfinder content via the Action button
* **Voice Control gets natural language input**: Users can navigate iPhone and iPad using intuitive phrases like "tap the purple folder" instead of memorizing exact labels
* **Accessibility Reader expands capabilities**: Now handles complex documents with multiple columns, images, and tables; includes on-demand summaries and built-in translation
* **Auto-generated subtitles across Apple ecosystem**: On-device speech recognition creates subtitles for uncaptioned videos on iPhone, iPad, Mac, Apple TV, and Vision Pro
* **Vision Pro wheelchair control**: Eye-tracking system enables users to control compatible power wheelchairs, launching with Tolt and LUCI alternative drive systems in the U.S.
* **Hikawa Grip & Stand now globally available**: Adaptive MagSafe accessory designed for users with grip, strength, and mobility challenges, now in three new colors
* **Additional updates**: Vehicle Motion Cues for visionOS, improved hearing aid pairing, larger text support for tvOS, Name Recognition in 50+ languages, and Sony Access controller support
* **Privacy-first approach**: All Apple Intelligence features maintain on-device processing to protect user privacy
* **Availability**: Features coming later in 2026; Hikawa accessory available now on Apple Store online

### Apple 发布由 Apple Intelligence 驱动的全新辅助功能

* **Apple Intelligence 增强核心辅助功能工具**：VoiceOver、放大器、语音控制和辅助功能阅读器获得 AI 驱动的能力，包括详细的图像描述和自然语言导航
* **VoiceOver 和放大器改进**：图像浏览器提供照片、文档和视觉内容的详细描述；用户可通过操作按钮询问取景器内容相关问题
* **语音控制支持自然语言输入**：用户可使用直观短语（如"点击紫色文件夹"）导航 iPhone 和 iPad，无需记忆精确标签
* **辅助功能阅读器扩展能力**：现可处理包含多列、图像和表格的复杂文档；包含按需摘要和内置翻译功能
* **Apple 生态系统自动生成字幕**：设备端语音识别为 iPhone、iPad、Mac、Apple TV 和 Vision Pro 上的无字幕视频创建字幕
* **Vision Pro 轮椅控制功能**：眼动追踪系统使用户能够控制兼容的电动轮椅，首先支持美国的 Tolt 和 LUCI 替代驱动系统
* **Hikawa Grip & Stand 全球发售**：专为握力、力量和移动能力受限用户设计的适配性 MagSafe 配件，现推出三种新颜色
* **其他更新**：visionOS 的车辆运动提示、改进的助听器配对、tvOS 的大字体支持、50 多种语言的姓名识别以及 Sony Access 控制器支持
* **隐私优先方法**：所有 Apple Intelligence 功能均采用设备端处理以保护用户隐私
* **上市时间**：功能将于 2026 年晚些时候推出；Hikawa 配件现已在 Apple Store 在线商店发售

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://www.apple.com/newsroom/2026/05/apple-unveils-new-accessibility-features-and-updates-with-apple-intelligence/)**

### Error Page Analysis

* **Content Type**: Error message page from X.com (formerly Twitter)
* **Primary Message**: Generic error notification with retry option
* **User Action**: Prompts user to try again via button
* **Technical Note**: Warning about privacy extensions potentially causing compatibility issues with x.com
* **Page Elements**: Error text, retry button, and warning icon with extension-related troubleshooting tip
* **No Substantive Content**: This is a standard error page with no article or blog content to summarize

### 错误页面分析

* **内容类型**：来自 X.com（原 Twitter）的错误消息页面
* **主要信息**：通用错误通知，带有重试选项
* **用户操作**：通过按钮提示用户重试
* **技术说明**：警告隐私相关扩展程序可能导致 x.com 兼容性问题
* **页面元素**：错误文本、重试按钮以及带有扩展程序相关故障排除提示的警告图标
* **无实质内容**：这是一个标准错误页面，没有可供总结的文章或博客内容

## 🔥 GitHub Trending / GitHub 热门项目

### OpenHuman - Your Personal AI Super Intelligence

* **What it does**: OpenHuman is an open-source agentic assistant that integrates deeply into your daily workflow, connecting to 118+ services (Gmail, Notion, GitHub, Slack, etc.) via one-click OAuth and building a comprehensive local knowledge base from your data.

* **Key features**: 
  - Desktop mascot with personality that joins Google Meets as a real participant
  - Memory Tree system that auto-fetches and compresses data from all connected services every 20 minutes into an Obsidian-compatible wiki
  - Smart token compression (TokenJuice) reducing costs by up to 80%
  - Batteries-included toolset: web search, scraping, filesystem operations, git, voice (STT/TTS), model routing
  - Privacy-first: all data stays encrypted locally on your device

* **Why it's notable**: Unlike other AI assistants that take weeks to learn your context, OpenHuman achieves full contextual awareness in minutes through automated data syncing and intelligent compression. Built in Rust with a clean UI-first approach, it eliminates the typical config-heavy setup while maintaining complete data sovereignty. The project gained nearly 4,000 stars today, reflecting strong demand for private, powerful AI assistants that don't require cloud data sharing.

---

### OpenHuman - 你的个人 AI 超级智能

* **功能介绍**: OpenHuman 是一个开源的智能助手,通过一键 OAuth 深度集成 118+ 个服务(Gmail、Notion、GitHub、Slack 等),并从你的数据中构建全面的本地知识库。

* **主要特点**:
  - 拥有个性的桌面吉祥物,可作为真实参与者加入 Google Meet 会议
  - 记忆树系统每 20 分钟自动抓取并压缩所有已连接服务的数据,生成兼容 Obsidian 的知识库
  - 智能令牌压缩技术(TokenJuice)可降低高达 80% 的成本
  - 内置完整工具集:网页搜索、抓取、文件系统操作、git、语音(STT/TTS)、模型路由
  - 隐私优先:所有数据在本地加密存储

* **为何值得关注**: 与其他需要数周时间学习上下文的 AI 助手不同,OpenHuman 通过自动数据同步和智能压缩在几分钟内即可实现完整的上下文感知。采用 Rust 构建,界面简洁优先,无需繁琐配置即可保持完全的数据主权。该项目今日获得近 4,000 个星标,反映了市场对无需云端数据共享的私密、强大 AI 助手的强烈需求。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/tinyhumansai/openhuman)**

### CLI-Anything - Making ALL Software Agent-Native

* **What it does**: CLI-Anything transforms any software into agent-ready command-line interfaces, enabling AI agents (like Pi, OpenClaw, Cursor, Claude Code) to directly control and automate applications through standardized CLIs. It bridges the gap between AI agents and the world's software by generating Python-based CLI harnesses for desktop apps, web services, and tools.

* **Key features**: 
  - **CLI-Hub package manager** (`pip install cli-anything-hub`) for browsing, installing, and managing community-built CLIs
  - **18+ production-ready harnesses** including Blender, Godot, FreeCAD, Inkscape, QGIS, Obsidian, Safari, n8n, and more
  - **2,269 passing tests** with comprehensive unit and E2E coverage
  - **Agent-first design** with JSON output, trajectory loops, and live preview capabilities for real artifact generation (CAD models, 3D scenes, diagrams, gameplay)
  - **Open contribution model** - community can submit new CLI harnesses via PR, instantly available through the hub

* **Why it's notable**: With 1,027 stars today, CLI-Anything addresses a critical gap in AI agent infrastructure by making traditional software "agent-native." Instead of agents being limited to text-based tools, they can now control professional creative software, game engines, GIS systems, and productivity apps. The project's rapid growth (18 CLIs added in April alone) and active community demonstrate strong demand for agent-software integration as AI coding assistants become mainstream.

---

### CLI-Anything - 让所有软件都能被 AI 智能体原生调用

* **功能介绍**: CLI-Anything 将任何软件转换为智能体就绪的命令行接口,使 AI 智能体(如 Pi、OpenClaw、Cursor、Claude Code)能够通过标准化 CLI 直接控制和自动化应用程序。它通过为桌面应用、Web 服务和工具生成基于 Python 的 CLI 封装,在 AI 智能体与全球软件之间架起桥梁。

* **主要特点**:
  - **CLI-Hub 包管理器**(`pip install cli-anything-hub`)用于浏览、安装和管理社区构建的 CLI
  - **18+ 个生产就绪的封装**,包括 Blender、Godot、FreeCAD、Inkscape、QGIS、Obsidian、Safari、n8n 等
  - **2,269 个通过测试**,具有全面的单元测试和端到端测试覆盖
  - **智能体优先设计**,支持 JSON 输出、轨迹循环和实时预览功能,可生成真实产物(CAD 模型、3D 场景、图表、游戏玩法)
  - **开放贡献模式** - 社区可通过 PR 提交新的 CLI 封装,立即通过 Hub 提供

* **为何值得关注**: CLI-Anything 今日获得 1,027 星标,解决了 AI 智能体基础设施中的关键缺口,使传统软件变得"智能体原生"。智能体不再局限于基于文本的工具,现在可以控制专业创意软件、游戏引擎、GIS 系统和生产力应用。该项目的快速增长(仅 4 月就新增 18 个 CLI)和活跃社区表明,随着 AI 编码助手成为主流,对智能体-软件集成的需求强劲。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/HKUDS/CLI-Anything)**

### Academic Research Skills for Claude Code - AI-Powered Academic Writing Pipeline

* **What it does**: A comprehensive Claude Code plugin that automates the academic research workflow from initial research through peer review to final publication, handling citation verification, formatting, quality checks, and multi-agent review processes.

* **Key features**: 
  - 13-agent deep research team with PRISMA systematic review and Semantic Scholar API verification
  - 12-agent paper writing with style calibration, LaTeX formatting, and anti-plagiarism checks
  - 7-agent peer review system with 0-100 quality rubrics and cross-model verification
  - 10-stage pipeline with integrity gates that catch fabricated citations, statistical errors, and AI-generated prose patterns
  - Claim-level citation auditing (v3.8) to prevent hallucinated references
  - Material Passport system for reproducibility tracking

* **Why it's notable**: Addresses the critical problem of AI-generated citation hallucinations (146,932+ estimated for 2025 per Zhao et al.) by implementing human-in-the-loop verification at every stage. Unlike full automation tools that inherit failure modes like fabricated results and hallucinated citations, ARS positions AI as a copilot that handles grunt work (reference hunting, formatting, consistency checks) while keeping humans in control of research design, interpretation, and argumentation. The showcase demonstrates real-world effectiveness: Stage 2.5 integrity checks caught 15 fabricated references and 3 statistical errors before peer review.

---

### Academic Research Skills for Claude Code - AI 驱动的学术写作流程工具

* **功能介绍**: 一个全面的 Claude Code 插件,自动化学术研究的完整工作流程——从初始研究、论文撰写、同行评审到最终发表,处理引用验证、格式化、质量检查和多智能体评审流程。

* **主要特点**:
  - 13 个智能体组成的深度研究团队,支持 PRISMA 系统综述和 Semantic Scholar API 验证
  - 12 个智能体的论文写作系统,包含风格校准、LaTeX 格式化和反抄袭检查
  - 7 个智能体的同行评审系统,采用 0-100 质量评分标准和跨模型验证
  - 10 阶段流程管线,配备完整性关卡,可捕获伪造引用、统计错误和 AI 生成文本模式
  - 声明级引用审计功能(v3.8 版本),防止虚假引用
  - 材料护照系统,用于可重现性追踪

* **为何值得关注**: 针对 AI 生成引用幻觉这一严重问题(根据 Zhao 等人研究,2025 年估计超过 14.6 万条虚假引用),在每个阶段实施人机协作验证。与继承了结果伪造、引用幻觉等失败模式的全自动化工具不同,ARS 将 AI 定位为副驾驶——处理繁重工作(文献检索、格式化、一致性检查),同时让人类掌控研究设计、数据解读和论证逻辑。实际案例展示了其有效性:2.5 阶段完整性检查在同行评审前就捕获了 15 条伪造引用和 3 处统计错误。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/Imbad0202/academic-research-skills)**


## 🚀 Fast-Moving Repos / 快速崛起项目

### Zero - An Experimental Agent-First Programming Language

* **What it does**: Zero is a programming language designed specifically for AI agents as primary users, featuring a small, regular syntax that agents can learn quickly from examples and compiler feedback, with a comprehensive standard library to minimize dependency hunting.

* **Key features**: Agent-optimized learnability with minimal syntax; deep standard library covering common capabilities; deterministic tooling that outputs structured diagnostics, graph facts, and fix plans for agents to parse and act on; fast, scriptable developer experience with checking, running, formatting, and repair commands; emphasis on regularity over syntactic sugar.

* **Why it's notable**: This is one of the first programming languages explicitly designed for AI agents rather than humans, exploring how language design changes when agents are the primary audience. It's intentionally unstable (pre-1.0) as it experiments with patterns that work best for agent-driven development. The project represents a fundamental rethinking of programming language design in the age of AI coding assistants.

---

### Zero - 面向智能体的实验性编程语言

* **功能介绍**: Zero 是一门专为 AI 智能体设计的编程语言,采用小巧、规则的语法让智能体能够快速从示例和编译器反馈中学习,配备全面的标准库以减少依赖搜索。

* **主要特点**: 针对智能体优化的可学习性和极简语法;深度标准库覆盖常用功能;确定性工具链输出结构化诊断、依赖图和修复方案供智能体解析和执行;快速、可脚本化的开发体验,支持检查、运行、格式化和修复命令;强调规则性而非语法糖。

* **为何值得关注**: 这是首批明确为 AI 智能体而非人类设计的编程语言之一,探索当智能体成为主要用户时语言设计会发生什么变化。项目处于 1.0 之前的不稳定阶段,正在实验最适合智能体驱动开发的模式。代表了 AI 编码助手时代对编程语言设计的根本性重新思考。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/vercel-labs/zero)**

### native-feel-skill - Cross-Platform Desktop Architecture for Native-Feeling Apps

* **What it does**: Provides a comprehensive architectural blueprint for building cross-platform desktop apps (macOS/Windows) that feel indistinguishable from native applications, using a four-layer architecture: native shell → system WebView → Node backend → Rust core
* **Key features**: Eight architectural tenets distilled from Raycast 2.0; WebKit/WebView2 survival guide addressing common quirks (flickering, startup delays, memory issues); 75-item ship-readiness audit checklist; typed IPC contract pattern across Rust/Swift/C#/TypeScript; decision tree to determine if this architecture fits your project
* **Why it's notable**: Solves the fundamental tension between convenient cross-platform development and near-native performance—two goals that typically conflict. Based on reverse-engineering Raycast Beta.app, it captures production-proven patterns for sub-500ms launch times, <500MB memory footprint, and native UI conventions. Packaged as an Agent Skill that AI coding assistants can automatically load and apply to refactoring or greenfield projects.

---

### native-feel-skill - 打造原生体验的跨平台桌面应用架构

* **功能介绍**: 提供完整的架构蓝图，用于构建在 macOS/Windows 上运行且体验与原生应用无异的跨平台桌面应用，采用四层架构：原生外壳 → 系统 WebView → Node 后端 → Rust 核心
* **主要特点**: 从 Raycast 2.0 提炼的八大架构原则；WebKit/WebView2 生存指南，解决常见问题(闪烁、启动延迟、内存泄漏)；75 项发布就绪审计清单；跨 Rust/Swift/C#/TypeScript 的类型化 IPC 契约模式；决策树帮助判断该架构是否适合你的项目
* **为何值得关注**: 解决了跨平台开发便利性与原生性能之间的根本矛盾——这两个目标通常相互冲突。基于对 Raycast Beta.app 的逆向工程，总结了生产级实践模式，可实现低于 500ms 的启动时间、小于 500MB 的内存占用以及原生 UI 规范。以 Agent Skill 形式打包，AI 编程助手可自动加载并应用于重构或新项目开发。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/yetone/native-feel-skill)**

### 🎬 Why Zepto's Aadit Palicha Turned Down Stanford to Deliver Groceries
**Channel:** Y Combinator

* What the video covers: The entrepreneurial journey of Aadit Palicha, who made the unconventional decision to decline Stanford University to build Zepto, India's rapid grocery delivery startup
* Key topics discussed: The origin story of Zepto starting from a WhatsApp group, the quick-commerce business model, challenges of building in the Indian market, and the decision-making process behind choosing entrepreneurship over elite education
* Why it's worth watching: Offers rare insight into the mindset of a young founder who bet on execution over credentials, and provides a case study on quick-commerce logistics and market timing in emerging economies

---

### 🎬 Zepto 创始人 Aadit Palicha 为何拒绝斯坦福去送杂货
**频道:** Y Combinator

* 视频内容概述: 讲述 Aadit Palicha 的创业历程,他做出了拒绝斯坦福大学、转而创建印度快速杂货配送平台 Zepto 的非传统选择
* 主要话题: Zepto 从 WhatsApp 群组起步的创业故事、快速商务商业模式、在印度市场创业的挑战,以及选择创业而非名校教育背后的决策过程

### Gemini 3.5 Flash: Agentic Tasks at Scale with Frontier Intelligence

* **Speed and performance balance** makes 3.5 Flash ideal for long-horizon agentic tasks that previously took developers days or auditors weeks to complete
* **Cost efficiency** delivers results in a fraction of the time at less than half the cost of other frontier models
* **Rapid iteration capabilities** enable planning, building, and iterating to solve real-world problems including application development, codebase maintenance, and financial document preparation
* **Antigravity harness integration** transforms 3.5 Flash into a powerful engine for deploying collaborative subagents to tackle problems at scale
* **Supervised execution** reliably handles multi-step workflows and coding tasks while maintaining frontier-level performance for demanding use cases

### Gemini 3.5 Flash:大规模智能体任务与前沿智能

* **速度与性能的平衡**使 3.5 Flash 成为处理长周期智能体任务的理想选择,这些任务以前需要开发人员数天或审计人员数周才能完成
* **成本效益**以不到其他前沿模型一半的成本,在极短时间内交付结果
* **快速迭代能力**支持规划、构建和迭代以解决实际问题,包括应用程序开发、代码库维护和财务文档准备
* **Antigravity 框架集成**将 3.5 Flash 转变为部署协作子智能体的强大引擎,可大规模解决问题
* **监督执行**可靠地处理多步骤工作流和编码任务,同时为高要求用例保持前沿级别的性能

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-5/)**

### Google Search I/O 2026: AI Agents and Intelligent Monitoring

* **Search agents era**: Google is introducing the ability to create, customize, and manage multiple AI agents directly within Search for various tasks
* **Information agents**: These agents operate 24/7 in the background, intelligently reasoning across information to find what you need at the right moment
* **Comprehensive monitoring**: Agents scan the entire web including blogs, news sites, social posts, plus real-time data on finance, shopping, and sports
* **Intelligent updates with actions**: Agents send synthesized updates with actionable options, such as notifying you about apartment listings that match your exact requirements or alerting you when your favorite athletes announce sneaker collaborations
* **Availability**: Information agents will launch first for Google AI Pro & Ultra subscribers this summer

### Google 搜索 I/O 2026 更新：AI 智能体与智能监控

* **搜索智能体时代**：Google 推出在搜索中直接创建、自定义和管理多个 AI 智能体的功能，用于处理各种任务
* **信息智能体**：这些智能体全天候在后台运行，智能地跨信息推理，在恰当时刻找到您需要的内容
* **全面监控**：智能体扫描整个网络，包括博客、新闻网站、社交媒体帖子，以及金融、购物和体育等实时数据
* **智能更新与操作**：智能体发送综合更新并提供可操作选项，例如通知符合您确切要求的公寓房源，或在您喜欢的运动员宣布球鞋联名时提醒您
* **上线时间**：信息智能体将于今年夏季首先面向 Google AI Pro 和 Ultra 订阅用户推出

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026/)**

### Advancing Content Provenance for a Safer, More Transparent AI Ecosystem

* **Multi-layered provenance approach**: OpenAI is strengthening content provenance through C2PA conformance, Google SynthID watermarking for images, and a public verification tool to help users identify AI-generated content
* **C2PA conformance**: OpenAI became a C2PA Conforming Generator Product, enabling platforms to read, preserve, and pass along provenance information attached to content across the ecosystem
* **SynthID watermarking partnership**: Partnering with Google DeepMind to embed invisible SynthID watermarks in images generated through ChatGPT, Codex, and OpenAI API, complementing metadata-based approaches
* **Dual-layer resilience**: C2PA metadata provides detailed context while SynthID watermarks survive transformations like screenshots and file format changes, making provenance more durable than either method alone
* **Public verification tool**: Launching a preview tool at openai.com/verify that checks for both Content Credentials and SynthID watermarks to help users verify if images were generated by OpenAI
* **Cautious detection approach**: The tool avoids definitive conclusions when no signals are detected, acknowledging that provenance signals can sometimes be stripped or lost
* **Future expansion plans**: Initially limited to OpenAI-generated content, with plans to support cross-industry verification and additional content types in coming months

### 推进内容溯源,构建更安全、更透明的AI生态系统

* **多层溯源方法**: OpenAI通过C2PA合规认证、谷歌SynthID图像水印技术以及公共验证工具,加强内容溯源能力,帮助用户识别AI生成内容
* **C2PA合规认证**: OpenAI成为C2PA合规生成产品,使平台能够读取、保存并传递附加在内容上的溯源信息,实现跨生态系统传播
* **SynthID水印合作**: 与谷歌DeepMind合作,在通过ChatGPT、Codex和OpenAI API生成的图像中嵌入不可见的SynthID水印,补充基于元数据的方法
* **双层防护机制**: C2PA元数据提供详细上下文信息,而SynthID水印能在截图和文件格式转换等操作中保留,使溯源比单一方法更持久可靠
* **公共验证工具**: 在openai.com/verify推出预览版工具,可检查内容凭证和SynthID水印,帮助用户验证图像是否由OpenAI生成
* **谨慎检测策略**: 当未检测到信号时,工具不会做出明确结论,因为溯源信号有时可能被剥离或丢失
* **未来扩展计划**: 初期仅限于OpenAI生成的内容,计划在未来几个月内支持跨行业验证和更多内容类型

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://openai.com/index/advancing-content-provenance/)**

### Superpowers - An Agentic Skills Framework for AI-Powered Software Development

* **What it does**: A complete software development methodology that transforms coding agents (like Claude, Cursor, Copilot) into systematic developers. Instead of jumping straight into code, agents first brainstorm with you, create detailed specs, build implementation plans, then execute through subagent-driven development with built-in code review.

* **Key features**: 
  - **Structured workflow**: Brainstorming → Git worktrees → Planning → Subagent execution → TDD enforcement → Code review → Branch completion
  - **Test-Driven Development**: Enforces RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle, deletes code written before tests
  - **Subagent-driven development**: Autonomous multi-hour coding sessions with two-stage review (spec compliance + code quality)
  - **Composable skills library**: 15+ skills covering testing, debugging, collaboration, and meta-development
  - **Multi-platform**: Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot CLI, Codex, Gemini CLI, and more

* **Why it's notable**: Gaining 1,620 stars today because it solves a critical problem—AI agents that write code without planning or testing. Superpowers enforces software engineering best practices (YAGNI, DRY, systematic debugging) through mandatory workflows, not suggestions. It's the first comprehensive methodology that makes coding agents work like disciplined engineers rather than enthusiastic juniors with poor judgment.

---

### Superpowers - AI 编程代理的技能框架与软件开发方法论

* **功能介绍**: 一套完整的软件开发方法论,将编程 AI 代理(如 Claude、Cursor、Copilot)转变为系统化的开发者。代理不会直接开始写代码,而是先与你头脑风暴、创建详细规格说明、构建实施计划,然后通过子代理驱动开发执行,并内置代码审查机制。

* **主要特点**:
  - **结构化工作流**: 头脑风暴 → Git 工作树 → 规划 → 子代理执行 → TDD 强制执行 → 代码审查 → 分支完成
  - **测试驱动开发**: 强制执行"红-绿-重构"循环,删除在测试之前编写的代码
  - **子代理驱动开发**: 支持数小时自主编码,配备两阶段审查(规格合规性 + 代码质量)
  - **可组合技能库**: 15+ 个技能涵盖测试、调试、协作和元开发
  - **多平台支持**: 兼容 Claude Code、Cursor、Copilot CLI、Codex、Gemini CLI 等

* **为何值得关注**: 今日获得 1,620 星标,因为它解决了一个关键问题——AI 代理在没有规划或测试的情况下编写代码。Superpowers 通过强制性工作流(而非建议)来执行软件工程最佳实践(YAGNI、DRY、系统化调试)。这是首个让编程代理像训练有素的工程师而非判断力差的热情新手那样工作的综合方法论。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/obra/superpowers)**

### Claude Code Plugins Directory - Official Plugin Marketplace for Claude Code

* **What it does**: Serves as the official, curated directory of high-quality plugins for Claude Code, Anthropic's AI-powered development environment. Provides a centralized marketplace where developers can discover, install, and manage plugins that extend Claude Code's capabilities.

* **Key features**: 
  - Dual plugin ecosystem with internal (Anthropic-developed) and external (community/partner) plugins
  - Simple installation via `/plugin install` command or discovery interface
  - Standardized plugin structure supporting MCP servers, slash commands, agents, and skills
  - Quality and security vetting for external submissions through formal review process

* **Why it's notable**: This is Anthropic's first official plugin marketplace for Claude Code, establishing the foundation for an extensible AI development ecosystem. With 127 stars today, it signals growing developer interest in customizing and extending Claude's coding capabilities. The structured approach to plugin management and security vetting demonstrates Anthropic's commitment to building a trustworthy extension platform for their AI development tools.

---

### Claude Code 插件目录 - Claude Code 官方插件市场

* **功能介绍**: 作为 Claude Code 的官方精选插件目录，为 Anthropic 的 AI 驱动开发环境提供集中式插件市场。开发者可以在此发现、安装和管理扩展 Claude Code 功能的插件。

* **主要特点**:
  - 双重插件生态系统，包含内部插件（Anthropic 开发）和外部插件（社区/合作伙伴）
  - 通过 `/plugin install` 命令或发现界面简单安装
  - 标准化插件结构，支持 MCP 服务器、斜杠命令、代理和技能
  - 外部提交需通过正式审核流程进行质量和安全审查

* **为何值得关注**: 这是 Anthropic 为 Claude Code 推出的首个官方插件市场，为可扩展的 AI 开发生态系统奠定基础。今日获得 127 星标，表明开发者对定制和扩展 Claude 编码能力的兴趣日益增长。结构化的插件管理和安全审查方法体现了 Anthropic 致力于为其 AI 开发工具构建可信赖扩展平台的决心。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-plugins-official)**

### zerolang - An Experimental Agent-First Programming Language

* **What it does**: Zero is a programming language designed specifically for AI agents as primary users, featuring a small, regular syntax that agents can learn quickly from examples and compiler feedback, with a comprehensive standard library to minimize dependency hunting.

* **Key features**: Agent-optimized learnability with minimal syntax; deep standard library covering common capabilities; deterministic tooling that outputs structured diagnostics, graph facts, and fix plans for agents to parse and act on; fast, scriptable developer experience with check, run, build, and repair commands; emphasis on regularity and explicitness over syntactic sugar.

* **Why it's notable**: This is a pioneering experiment in language design that inverts traditional priorities—optimizing for AI agent comprehension rather than human preference. With 3K+ stars, it represents a bold exploration of what programming looks like when agents are first-class users. Currently pre-1.0 and intentionally unstable as it searches for optimal patterns, making it an interesting case study in the emerging field of agent-oriented development tools.

---

### zerolang - 面向智能体的实验性编程语言

* **功能介绍**: Zero 是一门专为 AI 智能体设计的编程语言,采用小巧规整的语法让智能体能快速从示例和编译器反馈中学习,配备全面的标准库以减少依赖搜索。

* **主要特点**: 针对智能体优化的可学习性和极简语法;深度标准库覆盖常用功能;确定性工具链输出结构化诊断、依赖图和修复方案供智能体解析执行;快速可脚本化的开发体验,支持检查、运行、构建和修复命令;强调规整性和显式表达而非语法糖。

* **为何值得关注**: 这是语言设计领域的开创性实验,颠覆了传统优先级——为 AI 智能体理解而非人类偏好优化。获得 3000+ 星标,代表了对智能体作为一等用户时编程形态的大胆探索。目前处于 1.0 前的刻意不稳定状态,正在探索最优模式,是智能体导向开发工具这一新兴领域的有趣案例。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/vercel-labs/zerolang)**

### VGGT-Omega - Multi-View 3D Vision Foundation Model from Meta AI and Oxford

* **What it does**: A transformer-based model that jointly predicts camera poses, depth maps, and 3D scene structure from multiple input images or video frames. It processes arbitrary numbers of views to reconstruct complete 3D scenes with camera parameters.

* **Key features**: 
  - 1B parameter model supporting up to 512px resolution
  - Outputs camera extrinsics/intrinsics, depth maps with confidence, and scene tokens
  - Text-aligned variant available for multimodal applications
  - Efficient scaling: processes 500 frames using ~43GB GPU memory
  - Interactive Gradio demo with 3D point cloud visualization

* **Why it's notable**: Accepted as an **oral presentation at CVPR 2026** (top ~2% of submissions), representing cutting-edge research from Meta AI and Oxford's Visual Geometry Group. Addresses the fundamental computer vision problem of multi-view 3D reconstruction with a unified foundation model approach. The model's ability to handle variable numbers of input frames and produce geometrically consistent outputs makes it valuable for applications in AR/VR, robotics, and 3D content creation.

---

### VGGT-Omega - Meta AI 和牛津大学的多视图 3D 视觉基础模型

* **功能介绍**: 基于 Transformer 的模型,可从多张输入图像或视频帧中联合预测相机位姿、深度图和 3D 场景结构。支持处理任意数量的视图以重建完整的 3D 场景及相机参数。

* **主要特点**:
  - 10 亿参数模型,支持最高 512 像素分辨率
  - 输出相机外参/内参、带置信度的深度图和场景特征
  - 提供文本对齐版本用于多模态应用
  - 高效扩展性:处理 500 帧仅需约 43GB 显存
  - 交互式 Gradio 演示,支持 3D 点云可视化

* **为何值得关注**: 被 **CVPR 2026 接收为口头报告**(约占投稿的前 2%),代表了 Meta AI 和牛津视觉几何组的前沿研究成果。该模型用统一的基础模型方法解决了多视图 3D 重建这一计算机视觉核心问题。其处理可变数量输入帧并生成几何一致输出的能力,使其在 AR/VR、机器人和 3D 内容创作等领域具有重要应用价值。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/facebookresearch/vggt-omega)**

### Railway Blocked by Google Cloud

### Remove AI Watermarks: Comprehensive Tool for Stripping Visible and Invisible AI Signatures

* **Multi-layered removal**: Eliminates visible watermarks (Google Gemini sparkle logo), invisible watermarks (SynthID, StableSignature, TreeRing), and AI metadata (C2PA, EXIF, XMP) in one command
* **Gemini/Nano Banana specialization**: Uses reverse alpha blending with NCC detection to remove sparkle logos at ~0.05s per image, no GPU required
* **Invisible watermark defeat**: Employs SDXL-based diffusion pipeline (resize to ~1024px → VAE encode → controlled noise → denoise at 50 steps/0.05 strength → decode → upscale) to destroy frequency-domain patterns
* **Smart face protection**: YOLO detects humans before diffusion, then blends original faces back with soft elliptical masks to prevent AI distortion of facial features
* **Analog humanizer**: Optional film grain and chromatic aberration injection makes outputs indistinguishable from screen photos, bypassing AI image classifiers
* **Metadata stripping**: Removes "Made with AI" triggers used by Instagram/Facebook/X (DigitalSourceType tags), plus EXIF prompts, PNG text chunks, and C2PA cryptographic provenance manifests
* **Broad AI model support**: Works on outputs from Google Gemini, ChatGPT/DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, Adobe Firefly, Midjourney, with model-specific approaches for each watermarking scheme
* **Installation flexibility**: Available via pipx/uv as isolated CLI tool, or editable install from repository; base install covers visible/metadata removal, GPU dependencies optional for invisible removal
* **Legal context**: Tool itself is lawful; usage regulated under EU AI Act (marking obligations start Dec 2026), US COPIED Act (criminalizes deceptive removal), China Deep Synthesis Regulation (mandatory labels), and state-specific deepfake laws

### 去除 AI 水印：全面清除可见与不可见 AI 签名的工具

* **多层清除能力**：一条命令即可移除可见水印（Google Gemini 闪光标志）、不可见水印（SynthID、StableSignature、TreeRing）和 AI 元数据（C2PA、EXIF、XMP）
* **Gemini/Nano Banana 专项处理**：使用反向 alpha 混合配合 NCC 检测移除闪光标志，每张图片约 0.05 秒，无需 GPU
* **不可见水印破解**：采用基于 SDXL 的扩散管道（调整至约 1024px → VAE 编码 → 受控噪声 → 50 步/0.05 强度去噪 → 解码 → 放大至原分辨率）摧毁频域模式
* **智能人脸保护**：扩散前用 YOLO 检测人物，扩散后用软椭圆遮罩将原始面部混合回来，防止 AI 扭曲面部特征
* **模拟人性化处理**：可选的胶片颗粒和色差注入使输出与屏幕照片无法区分，绕过 AI 生成图像分类器
* **元数据清除**：移除 Instagram/Facebook/X 使用的"AI 制作"触发标签（DigitalSourceType 标签），以及 EXIF 提示词、PNG 文本块和 C2PA 加密溯源清单
* **广泛 AI 模型支持**：适用于 Google Gemini、ChatGPT/DALL-E、Stable Diffusion、Adobe Firefly、Midjourney 的输出，针对每种水印方案采用特定方法
* **灵活安装方式**：可通过 pipx/uv 作为独立 CLI 工具安装，或从仓库可编辑安装；基础安装涵盖可见/元数据清除，不可见水印清除需可选 GPU 依赖
* **法律背景**：工具本身合法；使用受 EU AI 法案（标记义务 2026 年 12 月生效）、美国 COPIED 法案（欺骗性移除入刑）、中国深度合成规定（强制标签）及各州深度伪造法律监管

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://github.com/wiltodelta/remove-ai-watermarks)**

### Forge: A Reliability Layer for Self-Hosted LLM Tool-Calling

* **Purpose**: Python library that enhances small local LLMs (8B models) for multi-step agentic workflows through guardrails and context management
* **Performance**: Achieves 86.5% success rate on 26-scenario eval suite using Ministral-3 8B model, with 76% on hardest tier
* **Three usage modes**: WorkflowRunner (full lifecycle management), Guardrails middleware (composable reliability stack), Proxy server (OpenAI-compatible drop-in)
* **Key features**: Rescue parsing for malformed tool calls, retry nudges, step enforcement, VRAM-aware context budgets, tiered compaction
* **Backend support**: Works with Ollama, llama-server (llama.cpp), Llamafile, and Anthropic
* **Requirements**: Python 3.12+, running LLM backend
* **Installation**: `pip install forge-guardrails` with optional Anthropic support
* **Eval harness**: 26 scenarios split into baseline (OG-18) and advanced reasoning (8 scenarios) tiers for model qualification
* **Published research**: Academic paper available at DOI 10.1145/3786335.3813193
* **License**: MIT, open source project by Antoine Zambelli

### Forge：自托管 LLM 工具调用的可靠性层

* **用途**：Python 库，通过护栏机制和上下文管理增强小型本地 LLM（8B 模型）的多步骤智能体工作流能力
* **性能表现**：使用 Ministral-3 8B 模型在 26 个场景评估套件上达到 86.5% 成功率，最难层级达到 76%
* **三种使用模式**：WorkflowRunner（全生命周期管理）、Guardrails 中间件（可组合可靠性栈）、代理服务器（OpenAI 兼容的即插即用方案）
* **核心功能**：修复格式错误的工具调用、重试提示、步骤强制执行、显存感知的上下文预算、分层压缩
* **后端支持**：兼容 Ollama、llama-server（llama.cpp）、Llamafile 和 Anthropic
* **系统要求**：Python 3.12+，运行中的 LLM 后端
* **安装方式**：`pip install forge-guardrails`，可选 Anthropic 支持
* **评估框架**：26 个场景分为基线层（OG-18）和高级推理层（8 个场景）用于模型资格认证
* **学术发表**：研究论文已发表，DOI 编号 10.1145/3786335.3813193
* **开源协议**：MIT 许可证，由 Antoine Zambelli 开发的开源项目

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://github.com/antoinezambelli/forge)**

### agents-best-practices - Provider-Neutral Agent Harness Design Framework

* **What it does**: A comprehensive skill/reference for designing production-ready agentic systems with proper runtime controls, tool permissions, and safety guardrails. Works across Codex, Claude Code, and other AI agents to generate MVP blueprints, audit existing agents, and design secure tool architectures.

* **Key features**: Provider-neutral agentic loop design with typed tools and permission checks; planning mode with approval gates; context/memory management with auto-compaction; prompt caching optimization; observability, evals, and launch checklists; MCP and connector governance; works for coding, research, operations, finance, healthcare, and other agent domains.

* **Why it's notable**: Addresses the critical gap between "model proposes actions" and "production-safe execution" by providing a rigorous harness framework. Goes beyond prompt engineering to cover the full control plane: validation, authorization, budgets, structured observations, and incident response. The 854 stars reflect growing recognition that agent safety requires runtime discipline, not just better prompts.

---

### agents-best-practices - 提供商中立的智能体运行框架设计指南

* **功能介绍**: 为设计生产级智能体系统提供全面的技能参考，包含完善的运行时控制、工具权限管理和安全防护。支持 Codex、Claude Code 等多种 AI 智能体，可生成 MVP 蓝图、审计现有智能体、设计安全的工具架构。

* **主要特点**: 提供商中立的智能体循环设计，包含类型化工具和权限检查；带审批门控的规划模式；支持自动压缩的上下文/内存管理；提示缓存优化；可观测性、评估和发布检查清单；MCP 和连接器治理；适用于编码、研究、运营、金融、医疗等多种智能体场景。

* **为何值得关注**: 填补了"模型提议操作"与"生产安全执行"之间的关键空白，提供严格的运行框架。超越提示工程，覆盖完整的控制平面：验证、授权、预算、结构化观察和事件响应。854 星标反映出业界日益认识到智能体安全需要运行时纪律，而非仅靠更好的提示词。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/DenisSergeevitch/agents-best-practices)**

### Codex Complexity Optimizer - Safe Codebase Performance Analysis Tool

* **What it does**: Analyzes codebases to identify algorithmic complexity issues and performance bottlenecks, generating detailed optimization reports without modifying code by default
* **Key features**: Provides file/line-level complexity analysis, recommends specific optimizations with expected improvements, assigns risk levels to changes, and suggests required tests or benchmarks; can apply low-risk optimizations when explicitly requested
* **Why it's notable**: Offers a safety-first approach to performance optimization by separating analysis from implementation, making it ideal for teams wanting to understand performance issues before committing to changes; integrates as a Codex skill for seamless workflow integration

### Codex Complexity Optimizer - 安全的代码库性能分析工具

* **功能介绍**: 分析代码库以识别算法复杂度问题和性能瓶颈,生成详细的优化报告,默认情况下不修改代码
* **主要特点**: 提供文件/行级别的复杂度分析,推荐具体优化方案并预测改进效果,为变更分配风险等级,建议所需的测试或基准测试;在明确请求时可应用低风险优化
* **为何值得关注**: 采用安全优先的性能优化方法,将分析与实施分离,适合希望在提交更改前充分了解性能问题的团队;作为 Codex 技能集成,实现无缝工作流程

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/Kappaemme-git/codex-complexity-optimizer)**
